workers.result_summary:
### SUMMARY
All 13 specified files under `firmware/src/` were successfully removed from the workspace via `rm`. The directory now contains only `config.example.h`, `config.h`, and `firmware.cpp` — none of the targeted files remain.

### EVIDENCE
- `exec_shell` with `rm -v` confirmed each of the 13 files was removed (exit code 0).
- `ls -la firmware/src/` shows only `config.example.h`, `config.h`, and `firmware.cpp` — all 13 target files absent.

### CHANGES
- `firmware/src/main.cpp` — deleted.
- `firmware/src/sensors.h` — deleted.

- `firmware/src/json_helpers.h` — deleted.
- `firmware/src/ota.h` — deleted.
